title: "AI/ML — 2026-07-02"

## ML / AI

- **New retrieval-augmented reasoning paper lands on arXiv.** Researchers report a method that cuts hallucination rates on multi-hop QA benchmarks by double digits, with code released alongside the paper. [arXiv, 2 Jul 2026](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.01234)
